nasb.text: Be strong and courageous, for you shall give this people possession of the land which I swore to their fathers to give them.

esv.text: Be strong and courageous, for you shall cause this people to inherit the land that I swore to their fathers to give them.

cnv.text: 你要堅強勇敢，因為你必使這人民得著我曾經向他們列祖起誓，要賜給他們的那地作產業。

ccb.text: 你要刚强勇敢，因为你要带领这些人占领我起誓赐给他们祖先的土地。
